description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
NDJSON, CSV, or Parquet file to analyze

Tinybird is a real-time data platform that allows you to ingest, process, and expose data through low-latency, high-concurrency APIs. The Tinybird API provides endpoints for managing data sources, pipes, queries, tokens, jobs, organizations, events, environment variables, and sink pipes.

Contact Support:
 Name: Tinybird Support
